name: Emergency Rations
additional_info: Grants a Talent tool with 3 charges. Using the Talent tool consumes one of the charges to heal you for 20 flat health. This has a 15 second cooldown. Resting at a campfire, while not in combat, restores all charges
desc: Eat some of your emergency rations, healing you for 20 health. You can only use this 3 times before having to sit at a campfire outside of combat again.
